project.name: CBX Strategy V1
project.status: V7 Strategy Validated (2024-2026 Comprehensive Backtest + Full Audit Passed)

frontend.api_client: Axios with Interceptors + Next.js API Proxy

database.notations: Added Multi-Condition Context Filter columns (slope, price_vs_ema) to symbol_strategy_config.

infrastructure.proxy: Nginx (Reverse Proxy, SSL, Rate Limiting, IP Whitelisting)
infrastructure.cache: Redis (Fail-hard in Production, Mock for Non-Prod)

api_endpoints.explained: Frontend error reporting to Telegram with rate limiting

features: Strategy V7 Engine: Long-term validated Multi-Condition Context Filter
Robust Walk-Forward Analysis: Negative PnL overfitting guard
Production Ready Infrastructure: Docker Compose, Nginx, SSL, IP Whitelisting
Hardened Security: Mandatory 32-char JWT secret, SQL Whitelisting, API Permission Auditing
Telegram Control Bot with AI Gemini Assistant integration

logic: Compression Detector: Minimum 8 bars, Bottom 30% ATR/Range/BB-Width
Context Filter: LONG blocked only if price < EMA and slope < 0 (BOTH must be bad)
Trailing Stop: Ratchet logic (Tighter of 2-bar low/high vs 1.5 ATR floor)
Risk Management: 0.25% risk per trade, Notional-based fee calculation (0.05% taker/maker)
